PHASE:        Phase 8 Batch 6 Sub-batch 6.2d SHIPPED — Per Area Report paramsJson wiring. GenerateReportButton now emits a discriminated paramsJson for reportType==="area": { areaBoundaryId, startDate, endDate } matching parsePerAreaParams in get-per-area-report-data.ts. Closes the pipeline gap from 6.2a-6.2c — users could pick "Per Area Report" from the dropdown but the export was queued with empty paramsJson, rendering an empty report. With 6.2d the full chain is funder-deliverable: Patrols UI → GenerateReportButton (area + start/end dates) → reportExport.create paramsJson → BullMQ pdf-render → /print-render/[tenantSlug]/area/[exportId] (Page 1 event breakdown + patrol summary, Page 2 event + patrol track heatmaps, Page 3 fuel consumption KPIs + per-month breakdown) → MinIO upload → /api/exports/reports/[id]/download streaming Route Handler. No new DECISIONS_LOG entries — implementation matched the scope locked in STATE.md 8:42pm GMT+8 brief verbatim.

              MODIFIED generate-report-button.tsx (+~115 LOC) — NEW state: areaBoundaryId / startDate / endDate (React useState string); NEW trpc query: trpc.areaBoundary.list.useQuery({ isEnabled:true, limit:200 }, { enabled: open && canGenerate }) — gated on dialog open to avoid burning a trpc call on every Patrols page load; NEW helpers: buildParamsJson discriminates on reportType (area → {areaBoundaryId,startDate,endDate}, else → {}), confirmDisabled = create.isPending || (isAreaReport && !areaFieldsComplete); handleReportTypeChange resets area state when switching OFF "area" (prevents stale areaBoundaryId leak); handleClose resets all area state alongside reportType + paperSize; handleAreaChange / handleStartDateChange / handleEndDateChange handlers. NEW UI block (conditional on isAreaReport): area-report-fields wrapper (muted/30 border for visual grouping), area-boundary-select sourced from areaList.data?.items with empty/loading/no-areas placeholder, area-start-date-input + area-end-date-input (HTML type=date, YYYY-MM-DD). Generate button disabled prop wired to confirmDisabled. Added Input import from @/components/ui/input. JSDoc updated with 6.2d block.

              MODIFIED __tests__/generate-report-button.test.tsx (+~190 LOC, +5 net new cases — 1 existing case rewritten coverage→preserve baseline). Mock extension: vi.mock("@/lib/trpc/client") now includes areaBoundary.list.useQuery returning { items, nextCursor } matching real trpc shape, with stubs.areaListItems + stubs.areaListIsLoading overrideable per test. NEW stubs: areaListItems (default 2 enabled areas: Coral Sanctuary, Mangrove Bay) + areaListIsLoading. NEW cases: (1) switching to reportType=area reveals area-report-fields + 3 inputs; coverage hides all of them; (2) confirm disabled chain — disabled until areaBoundaryId, startDate, AND endDate all populated; partial fills keep disabled; (3) area happy path — paramsJson asserted exact shape {areaBoundaryId,startDate,endDate} with paperSize alongside; (4) state reset on off-ramp — selecting coverage clears area state, re-selecting area shows blank fields + disabled confirm; (5) empty areaListItems renders "No areas available" placeholder. MODIFIED: pre-existing area-branch happy-path test rewritten to reportType="coverage" — preserves baseline coverage of reportType+paperSize wiring with the still-valid paramsJson:{} shape (the OLD assertion expected area+empty paramsJson which is no longer valid behavior post-6.2d).

              Inline corrections during verification (none required handoff): (1) Lint flagged strict-boolean-expressions on `areaList.data?.items.length` (number | undefined in conditional) → wrapped as `(areaList.data?.items.length ?? 0) > 0`.
